leadership: Dean's List — William Paterson University (2024, 2025, 2026) — Awarded for achieving a 3.45+ GPA for all years

bullets: Built a dynamic weight-based routing system that benchmarked GPT-4, Claude 3, and Gemini in real-time, automatically selecting the highest-performing model per query based on response quality scoring.

Building Transactable, an AI-powered financial assistant using React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Claude AI that processes receipts, bank statements, and CSVs through OCR and natural language analysis, making financial statements easier to understand.

Built a full-stack event judging platform (Next.js 14, TypeScript, Supabase, Tailwind CSS) with passwordless magic-link auth, customizable weighted rubrics, and a draft-and-lock scoring workflow for hackathons and competitions.

Implemented real-time judge progress monitoring, CSV bulk participant import, and automated score aggregation with leaderboard export, replacing manual JotForm/Qualtrics workflows and cutting aggregation from hours to under a minute.

professionalExperience.role: Software Engineer Intern — Student Club Portal
bullets: Engineered a full-stack student organization portal serving 100+ campus clubs, automating event approvals, member registration, and announcements workflows using Node.js and PostgreSQL.
Onboarded 45+ clubs within the project timeline through responsive UI/UX design and role-based access control.

technicalProjects.name: Passaic360
technicalProjects.technologies: Next.js, Express, Supabase (PostgreSQL), TypeScript, Anthropic API, SerpAPI, Google Places
technicalProjects.description: Built a full-stack social services platform for Passaic County, NJ with role-based dashboards (resident, employer, admin), timesheet tracking with image uploads, and volunteer matching across 40+ routes and 80+ components. Integrated AI-powered features using the Anthropic API, including a context-aware assistant for SNAP compliance, an admin analytics tool querying live database snapshots, and intelligent volunteer-opportunity matching. Implemented internationalization across 11 languages with locale-aware routing, along with external API integrations and secure authentication using Supabase OAuth and phone OTP.

technicalProjects.name: Pioscore
technicalProjects.description: Engineered secure multi-tenant data architecture using Supabase RLS, normalized Postgres schema, environment-aware redirects, and rate limiting, deployed to production on Vercel. Built full-stack judging platform with magic-link auth, judge/admin dashboards, dynamic rubric editor, and live leaderboard, replacing manual scoring workflows end-to-end.

technicalProjects.name: AskAbhash — AI Digital Twin Chatbot
technicalProjects.technologies: Node.js, Express, OpenAI SDK, Firebase Firestore
technicalProjects.description: Implemented production RAG pipeline using Node.js, Express, OpenAI SDK, and Firebase Firestore vector search with DBSCAN clustering for behavioral analytics. Deployed conversational AI agent on personal portfolio (niroulaabhash.com.np) that answers recruiter questions in real-time using portfolio data.
